raw.command: ssh -J openstack@222.200.180.102 -o ServerAliveInterval=15 -o ServerAliveCountMax=4 -o ConnectTimeout=30 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ubuntu@10.10.3.110 export OPS_NAMESPACE=opsskill-exp && kubectl -n ${OPS_NAMESPACE} get deployments
raw.stdout:
NAME       READY   UP-TO-DATE   AVAILABLE   AGE
demo-app   1/1     1            1           9h
